notes: v1.2.48: Revert to non-modal QWidget overlay with callback - no nested exec(), no hiding parent, should fix crash. v1.2.47: Converted CaptureOverlay to QDialog with modal exec() to match v1.1.0 tkinter approach - should fix grey screen and crash issues. v1.2.46: Removed WA_ShowWithoutActivating from CaptureOverlay to fix mouse event blocking, added logging to track dialog result. v1.2.45: Using minimize() instead of hide(). v1.2.44: Removed hide/show cycle, fixed debug log truncation.
